channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large Cardboard box full of rubbish left on street, 27th June
item.description:
Box contains cardboard, iron grill, old food. Next to tree outside 94 Forburg Road n16 6 HT

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Forburg Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike blocking home entrance, 27th June
item.description:
Bike blocking home entrance

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Balls Pond Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bin overflowing with rubbish ( George Row Playground), 27th June
item.description:
George Row playground ( Dickens Estate ) needs an urgent litter pick . The park is full of litter on the floor. The bins are overflowing and need emptying.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): George Row, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car appears to be abandoned, 27th June
item.description:
Car has been here several days with no movement. Has quite alot of damage on one side - windows have been left open. No one has been to it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fairwater Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No mot, 27th June
item.description:
This car has been abandoned on the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Children a completely hidden to motorist at the crossing, 27th June
item.description:
Overgrown vegetation blocking the view to drivers approaching this crossing. very dangerous for children .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albion Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bin burnt down, 27th June
item.description:
The litter bin at the bus stop has been destroyed by fire and needs to be cleaned up and replaced.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Western Way, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement has risen up, 27th June
item.description:
Pavement has risen up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Orchard Road, Widmore, Greater London

item.title: Majesty car wash n4 2he, 27th June
item.description:
Majesty car wash make too much noise and parking car on the pavement they opened 7 oclock and we can’t sleep because of noise
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lanes, Hackney, London

item.description:

item.title: Bill Smith, 27th June
item.description:
Payment damaged but shed need cutting back to fence rodent running around from the canal into the bushes people living in there
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dean Road, Thamesmead

item.title: Ítems missed from previous tipping report, 27th June

item.title: All over the public football, 27th June
item.description:
All over the public highway fence line where the woods are and Woolwich poly school for girls brambles covering public highway

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Floathaven Close, Thamesmead

item.title: Public pathway, 27th June
item.description:
Can someone please come and cut back these bushes with thorns on the branches that are blocking the highway for the public

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodall Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: ALL FIVE paper and cardboard bins at Norman park car park, Bromley Common end left full and over flowing at a busy weekend AS USUAL - an absolute MESS., 27th June
item.description:

item.title: Abandoned open back truck, 27th June
item.description:
Unmoved for several months and very rusty with sharp panels at the back.Registration identifies as MOT for a white Ford transit van ?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Merlin Road, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bike abandoned on East side of Westgate Road opposite No 63, 27th June
item.description:
A Lime bike has been abandoned on the grass verge on the East Side of Westgate Road, opposite No 63. Please can it be removed? Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westgate Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
